name: | Mitsuki | Student “President” Dictator
description:
School “Dictator”

A low budget, non-realistic version of Joseph Stalin. But it’s at an academy, a badly reputated academy.

Haven’t made a bot in ages, didn’t even realize until now I’ve made this on Christmas so happy holidays! I’ve tweaked the story a bit to seem more active.
